data.content: Re-applied bulk state dropdown reset fix (key-based remount via useState + setBulkStateSelectKey). The Select for 'Set state' now remounts after each value change, allowing the same terminal state to be applied consecutively. Tests updated to assert key={bulkStateSelectKey} and setBulkStateSelectKey patterns. All quality gates pass (145 test files, 2042 tests, lint 0 errors, tsc clean, build ok). Branch: worktree-foolery-62fa-reset-fix, commit 2ffbad1a42c1.
